proposed_description: The productive obligation sense: il modulo va compilato, le medicine vanno prese. Present-tense va/vanno plus a participle, meaning something must be done.

proposed_attributes.canonical_example: Il modulo va compilato in stampatello.

rationale: The single andare leaf conflates two constructions that behave differently and mislead in different ways: the productive obligation sense (va compilato, present tense, the common_miss is reading va as motion) and the fixed lexical loss sense below. I authored 4 obligation items and 1 loss item against the parent; they already cite passive.formation.andare so nothing strict-rejects, but separate histories would let the obligation drill and the loss idiom accrue distinct diagnostics. Prefixes pas_and_ (obligation) and pas_and_loss_ would make later migration mechanical. Low priority; flagged for Architecture, not needed for this batch to load.

proposed_description: The lexical loss sense with a small verb set (perdere, smarrire): il pacco è andato perso. Compound tense, essere auxiliary, real agreement; not obligation.

proposed_attributes.canonical_example: Il pacco è andato perso durante il trasloco.

rationale: Splits the loss idiom (andare perso/smarrito) off from obligation. It takes essere in the compound and behaves like a motion verb, unlike the present-tense obligation va/vanno, so a learner's miss on one says nothing about the other. See rationale on the obligation sibling.
